description: Word-segmentation reference fixture generated by running the VENDORED, CORRECTED myWord word segmenter (tools/data-pipeline/reference/myword/word_segment.py) against curated Burmese inputs. The fix restores the bigram lookup to the tuple-key shape that actually exists in bigram-word.bin so the Viterbi scorer is now a true unigram+bigram model. The TypeScript port asserts identical token sequences. Regenerate via `python app/lib/segmenter/scripts/generate-reference.py`.
